path: 01 Journal/2026/2026-02 February/2026-02-09 IDTA Submodel Architect Day Agenda.pdf
text: Agenda IDTA Submodel Architect Day Date/Time: 09. Feb 2026, 10:00 – 16:30 CET Location/Link: IDTA at VDMA, Conference Room 10, Lyoner Strasse 16, 60528 Frankfurt am Main 01 10:00 Registration and welcome Sudip Adhikari (IDTA) 02 10:15 Keynote Speech: Why is Architect Day more important today than ever before? Prof. Dr. Michael Hoffmeister (Hochschule Karlsruhe) Bernd Vojanec (Wittenstein) 03 10:45 Keynote Speech: Tipps and Tricks for Modeling? Key Topics such as: - Metamodel and Submodel template - Questions from the community - New modelling approaches - A look at upcoming Submodel topics - Query language, and AAS-Events. - Semantic ID, supplemental semantic id, how to create a Submodel template specification - Change of ownership effects on AAS ID´s Dr. Sebastian Bader (SAP) Juilee Tikekar (IDTA) 04 11:15 Submodel Toolchain and Hands-on: From idea to application Key Topics such as: - Overview of the toolchain: AsciiDoc, Package Explorer, GitHub, Asset data Exchange Hub (Adx Hub), SMT repositories - Validation & conformity: How do you check Submodel quality? - Live demo: Creating a new Submodel template - Using the IDTA portal & review process - Automation & quality assurance in practice - AAS Editor Sandeep Rudra (IDTA) 11:45 Coffee Break 05 12:15 Cooperation and harmonization: JWG with Catena-X, NAMUR, OPC Foundation, EUROMAP (JWG Pitch) Key Topics such as: - Joint working groups - Harmonization of Submodel standards across domains - Practical examples: Battery Passport, Digital Product Passport, interoperable interfaces - Challenges & opportunities of collaboration - How can companies get involved? Catena-X (Tbc.) Andreas Schüller (rep. NAMUR) Kazeem Olamilekan Oladipupo (rep. OPC Foundation) Dr. Mikula Thiem (rep. EUROMAP) 06 13:00 Creating a new Submodel: Best practices Talk - Submodel Prdouct Material Compliance - From idea to realization Inga Müller (WAGO) 13:15 Lunch 07 14:00 Extended Panel Discussion: Shaping the Future of Submodels Moderator: Prof. Dr. Michael Hoffmeister, Bernd Vojanec, Sudip Adhikari - Challenges with Submodel creation - Trends in Submodel templates - Use Cases (Digital Product Passport (DPP), Battery pass template) - How to focus on users? All 08 15:00 Deep Dive Workshops / Ask the Experts - Data quality in Submodel templates - Challenges with Submodel creation - New topics to address Sandeep Rudra and Jui Tikekar (IDTA) Melanie Stolze (Ifak) Bernd Vojanec (Wittenstein) 15:45 Coffee Break 09 16:00 Best practices Talk - Submodel Application (Digital Nameplate, DPP) Roland Dunker (R-Stahl) 10 16:15 Summary Prof. Dr. Michael Hoffmeister (Festo) Bernd Vojanec (Wittenstein) Sudip Adhikari (IDTA) 16:30 End of the Submodel Architect Day
